There's one free plugin that's completely changed how I use Claude Code. It's called Superpowers, and it turns Claude Code into a disciplined developer that clarifies, designs, plans, codes, and verifies before shipping anything. 

In this video I walk through all 14 skills, show real brainstorming demos, and share the results from a 12-run experiment comparing token usage and code quality with and without the plugin installed.
